seoTitle: Point Stuart vs Rakula — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Point Stuart and Rakula. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Point Stuart vs Rakula: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Stuart and Rakula.
heading: Point Stuart vs Rakula — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Stuart, Northern Territory and Rakula, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Stuart has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Rakula (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Stuart or Rakula safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Stuart has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Rakula scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Stuart scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Rakula scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Stuart or Rakula?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Stuart has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
